name: Samsara Inc.
summary: PART I Overview Samsara is on a mission to increase the safety, efficiency, and sustainability of the operations that power the global economy. To realize this vision, we pioneered the Connected Operations Platform, which is an open platform that connects the people, assets, and systems of some of the worlds most complex operations, allowing them to develop actionable insights and improve their operations.
